markdown:
#  Remove a User from Projects in Your Company's Procore Account 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/permissions)
  * You can search by project name, number, or address.
  * 100 projects load per page and you can select projects across multiple pages.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Directory** tool.
  2. Click **Users**.
  3. Click **View** next to the name of the user you want to add to one or more projects.
  4. Click the **Projects** tab.
  5. Click **Edit Projects**.
  6. _Optional:_ Search for projects by project name, number, address, city, state, zip, and phone number.
  7. _Optional:_ Click **More Filters** and select filters relating to the projects. Then click **Apply**.
  8. Update project assignments:
     * **Bulk Update Project Assignments**
       1. Mark the checkboxes for the projects, then click **Edit**.
       2. Under 'Project Assignment', select **Remove**.
       3. Click **Apply**.
       4. Click **Next**.
       5. Review the changes, then click **Save**.  
_Note:_ Click **Undo** to remove an unwanted change before clicking save.
     * **Remove from All Projects**
       1. Click **Remove from All projects**.
       2. Click **Save** to remove from all projects.
     * **Update a Single Project Assignment**
       1. Click the field under the 'Project Assignment' column and select **Remove**.
       2. Click **Next**.
       3. Review the changes, then click **Save**.  
_Note:_ Click **Undo** to remove an unwanted change before clicking save.


## See Also
  * [Add a User to Projects in Your Company's Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/add-an-existing-user-to-projects-in-your-companys-procore-account)
  * [What granular permissions are available for the Company level Directory tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-the-company-level-directory-tool)
  * [Directory (Company) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/permissions)
title: Remove a User from Projects in Your Company's Procore Account
description: How to remove an existing user from one or more projects in the Company level Directory tool.
